selections.name: Lucky Pat
selections.reason: Won on debut at this track and distance. Has the early speed to overcome the wide draw and looks a promising type.

selections.name: Pixie Lane
selections.reason: Finished second on debut here, then was 5th behind the top pick. Can improve and be competitive.

selections.name: Mishani Rainfire
selections.reason: Finished 4th behind Lucky Pat last start. Fitter for that run and is in the mix for exotics.

selections.name: Raging Raider
selections.reason: First starter who trialled well recently. Draws the inside barrier which is a big advantage here.

danger_horse.name: Pixie Lane
danger_horse.reason: Has race experience here and can improve off her last run.

selections.name: Zoustrology
selections.reason: Placed third last start at Eagle Farm and has been consistent. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the class.

selections.name: Lope By Night
selections.reason: Finished a close 4th last start at Gatton. Draws well here and should be peaking third-up.

selections.name: Magic Invader
selections.reason: Eased back early last start but has shown ability previously. Can figure in the finish with a better run.

selections.name: Husson's Treasure
selections.reason: Finished 4th at this track two starts back. Improver who can sneak into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Lope By Night
danger_horse.reason: Draws perfectly in barrier 2 and has been knocking on the door.

selections.name: Kozak Prince
selections.reason: Won well last start at Sunshine Coast. Comes off a big win and can build on that momentum.

selections.name: Clive's Glory
selections.reason: Won two starts back and boxed on steadily for 4th last time. Draws the inside and will be prominent.

selections.name: Inquicktime
selections.reason: Won easily last start by 3 lengths. Up in class but has confidence and is a genuine threat.

selections.name: Contingency
selections.reason: Second-up here. Won second-up previously and is suited over the longer distance.

danger_horse.name: Clive's Glory
danger_horse.reason: Gets the inside run and has proven form in this grade.

selections.name: Hello Dolly Diva
selections.reason: Solid 4th last start and 2nd before that. Rates strongly in this field and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Our Mate Locky
selections.reason: Consistent type who finished 3rd last start. Draws the inside and will get a great run.

selections.name: Prize Witness
selections.reason: Finished 4th last start and 2nd before that. Wide draw is tricky but has the ability to overcome it.

selections.name: Piggietales
selections.reason: Held ground for 2nd last start. Making headway and won't be far away.

danger_horse.name: Our Mate Locky
danger_horse.reason: Drawn perfectly and has been very consistent recently.

selections.name: Heroic Rebel
selections.reason: Racing well recently with a solid 2nd last start. Ready to win and hard to risk from a good draw.

selections.name: Busker
selections.reason: Finished 3rd last start and 2nd before that. Consistent form makes him a major player despite the wide gate.

selections.name: Piston Rebel
selections.reason: Forgive last start 9th. Previous form was solid and is well placed to bounce back here.

selections.name: Our Jewel
selections.reason: Finished 4th last start. Genuine type who gets her chance to figure in the placings.

danger_horse.name: Busker
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent and will be charging late if they overdo it up front.

selections.name: Autumn Heir
selections.reason: Finished a close 2nd last start. Gets a leading jockey and is ready to win at this distance.

selections.name: Kalkanli
selections.reason: Sat on the speed and boxed on for 2nd last start. Tough to beat if he dictates terms.

selections.name: Slugworth
selections.reason: Finished 5th last start but was 2nd prior. Looking to bounce back and has claims.

selections.name: Aboveforty
selections.reason: Has ability but needs to improve on recent runs. Capable of better.

danger_horse.name: Kalkanli
danger_horse.reason: Will be on the pace and could prove hard to run down on this tight track.

selections.name: Italian Riviera
selections.reason: Resuming from a break but won a recent trial. Goes well fresh and looks a strong chance.

selections.name: Scrumptious
selections.reason: Finished 7th last start but draws perfectly here. Well placed to improve sharply.

selections.name: Fort William
selections.reason: Finished 7th last start but was a solid 3rd prior. Fitter now and can feature.

selections.name: Guac On
selections.reason: Finished 4th last start. Gets the inside draw and can sneak into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Scrumptious
danger_horse.reason: Draws to get a soft run and has the class to upset the top pick.
